productDisplayName: Puma Men Heritage Black Polo Tshirts
description: Composition Black polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves that have ribbed hems with white lining, ribbed and tipped collar with a white lining and grey inseam, buttoned chest placket and embroidered branding on left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your brand statement in style with this black polo neck t-shirt from puma. The energetic Jumping cat on the chest exudes fiery vibes, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with sportswear when on a fitness drive, and with jeans and semi-formal shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
